sources.source_snippet: Tropical Depression Gener slightly intensifies as it moves toward Aurora, with TCWS No. 1 raised in parts of Luzon and coastal areas warned of strong winds.

title: 23 Filipino Seafarers Call for Help After Houthis Attack MT Sounion | Bombo Radyo Philippines
snippet: Twenty-three Filipino seafarers aboard the tanker MT Sounion are urgently calling for help after their vessel was attacked by Houthi rebels.
